title: Lower Lifesteal Fire
description: Low fire texture pack similar to the one used on Lifesteal. This pack uses custom models to remove the fire overlay from your screen completely
body:
### Describtion
A low fire texturepack similiar to the ones they use on Lifesteal. The difference is that this one has smaller fire blocks in general and uses minecrafts models to remove the fire from ur screen completely.

### Ingame
![Showcase]![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6d98167504bf05a800624fc80f8822b072bc24_0.webp)

### Credits
Thx to Melted for letting me use his textures as a base
